# @pro-laico/ap-mux-video

Wraps `@oversightstudio/mux-video` with Atomic Payload defaults and a local `mux-video` extension collection.

```ts
import { muxVideoPlugin } from '@pro-laico/ap-mux-video'

export default buildConfig({ plugins: [muxVideoPlugin()] })
```
